description: Stable York ExAI repo context for workspace loaders and MCP-style resource mapping.

resources.title: Human Roles
resources.summary: Defines Adam, Matt, and Joel plus Joel interaction and feedback routing rules.

resources.title: Voice And Tone
resources.summary: Defines Adam-facing, Matt-facing, Joel-facing, dashboard, customer, and planning voice rules.

resources.title: Owner Operating Preferences
resources.summary: Captures owner communication and approval preferences that shape automation behavior.

resources.title: York ExAI For Joel
resources.summary: Explains in Joel-facing language what York ExAI should handle day to day, what pain it should remove, and what is real now versus still coming.

resources.title: Joel-Facing Writing Guide
resources.summary: Defines how future agents should write Joel-facing explanations without slipping into product or software-helpdesk language.

resources.title: Business Model
resources.summary: Explains service lines, revenue model, operating reality, and platform protections.

resources.title: Central PA Operations
resources.summary: Defines route geography and operating assumptions for York, Harrisburg, Lancaster, and nearby territory.

resources.title: Compliance Scope
resources.summary: Defines approval-required areas and safe planning areas for pest-control workflow changes.

resources.title: Customer Communication
resources.summary: Captures tone and expectations for customer-facing messaging.

resources.title: Pest Catalog
resources.summary: Lists pest-specific urgency, inspection, follow-up, documentation, and billing implications.

resources.title: Terminology
resources.summary: Defines preferred pest-control terminology and wording boundaries.

resources.title: Domain Contracts
resources.summary: Defines the core entities for York ExAI.

resources.title: Event Contracts
resources.summary: Defines approved event names for operational state, analytics, and roadmap signals.

resources.title: Voice Memo Contract
resources.summary: Defines required fields, processing rules, and output surfaces for field voice memos.

resources.title: Workflow Contracts
resources.summary: Defines route-day, field-capture, closeout, billing, callback, and specialty workflow expectations.

resources.title: Morning Startup
resources.summary: Daily opening checklist for route, callbacks, paperwork, and billing risk.

resources.title: Route-Day Management
resources.summary: Operational checklist for ordered route execution, urgent inserts, and carryover handling.

resources.title: End-Of-Day Close
resources.summary: Checklist for unresolved work, closeout readiness, and invoice draft queuing.

resources.title: Missed Check-In Recovery
resources.summary: Recovery path when a stop misses its expected field check-in.

resources.title: Weekly Finance Review
resources.summary: Weekly review of unsent invoices, aging balances, expenses, and billing holds.

resources.title: Month-End Close
resources.summary: Monthly reconciliation and accountant handoff preparation.

resources.title: Roadmap Review
resources.summary: Procedure for grouping friction signals and promoting decision-ready work.

resources.title: Backup And Restore
resources.summary: Backup and restore expectations for database and document storage.

resources.title: CLI Validation And Trust
resources.summary: Defines how future agents should assess proven, degraded, and not-yet-proven York CLI behavior.

resources.title: Joel Route-Day Playbook
resources.summary: Walks a full Joel-style route day through York CLI validation scenarios from startup through backup.

resources.title: Validation Evidence Matrix
resources.summary: Maps validation scenarios to commands, expected outputs, events, artifacts, and pass criteria.
